## SortList class

The `SortList` component allows user to select the search results order. This component also allows to change the selected sort programmatically.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class SortList extends SortList_base 
```
<b>Extends:</b> SortList\_base

## Remarks

It extends [SortMixin](./x-components.sortmixin.md)<!-- -->.

|  [animation?](./x-components.sortlist.animation.md) |  | string \| typeof Vue | <i>(Optional)</i> The transition to use for rendering the list. |
